name: Repo/Project Registry Resolver
when_to_use: Разрешает mapping issue/project/area -> primary_repo / affected_repos / service_dependencies / required_checks / environments.
Seed rationale: У тебя это ключевой слой для multi-repo маршрутизации.
inputs: Опирается на Repository Registry. Умеет давать confidence и объяснение маршрутизации. Поддерживает repo_kind, environments, team_id, project_id.
steps: TBD: convert the seed build spec into a stable step-by-step skill contract.
stop_conditions: TBD: define success and stop boundaries before runtime consumption.
escalation_rules: Escalate when the required source-of-truth inputs are missing, contradictory, or blocked by a human-owned zone.
anti_patterns: Do not duplicate always-on repo guidance inside selective skills.
Do not silently widen role scope beyond the owning skill pack.
denied_actions: Do not treat this skeleton metadata as runtime-ready execution logic before the later runtime-consumption blocks.
description: Разрешает mapping issue/project/area -> primary_repo / affected_repos / service_dependencies / required_checks / environments.
why: У тебя это ключевой слой для multi-repo маршрутизации.
build_spec: Опирается на Repository Registry. Умеет давать confidence и объяснение маршрутизации. Поддерживает repo_kind, environments, team_id, project_id.
